category_sources: Official rEFIt project page at https://refit.sourceforge.net/ describes a boot menu and maintenance toolkit for EFI-based machines.
source_facts.description: "GPT and MBR partition tables synchronization tool".
docs_sources: Official rEFIt homepage links a Documentation page at https://refit.sourceforge.net/doc/.
source_facts.homepage is the official rEFIt project homepage for the source package that includes gptsync.
repo_sources: Official rEFIt homepage states latest development source code is available from the SourceForge Subversion repository; SourceForge project exposes the Code tab.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official rEFIt homepage describes EFI boot and maintenance tooling.
